Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xF0E8 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\For Speed We Need 3 (TND+Blazon - 2023).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $5100 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "For Speed We Need 3 (TND+Blazon - 2023).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $5000 which:
1. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 2. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $E000
Also patched the LDA $CE00 instruction at $0486 to LDA #$01, NOP in order to set the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to disable highscore loading and saving to disk
